title: Is That Nice?
writer: Walter A. Sinclair (story), Paul Gangelin (scenario), Jack Collins (scenario)
actors: George O'Hara, Doris Hill, Stanton Heck, Charles Thurston
plot: Ralph Tanner, a cub reporter on the Morning Standard, writes a highly libelous story about John Gorman, the political boss of the city. Wilbert, the publisher, and Dyke, the managing editor...
